displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Kimchi is one of the most well-known and healthy dishes of Korean food. CJ Bibigo Sliced Kimchi is made with the finest selection of ingredients with its 50 years of Kimchi making know-how.

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Keep refrigerated (0°C-10°C)
• For a better taste of Kimchi, refrigerate under 4°C

metaData.Ingredients:
Salted Napa Cabbage 71.2% (Napa Cabbage, Salt), Red Pepper Seasoned Paste 14.5% (Water, Radish, Red Pepper Powder, Garlic, Onion, Ginger, Flavour Enhancer (Monosodium glutamate), Salt], Green Onion, Starter Culture (Soy Peptone), Acidity Regulator (Calcium lactate)
• Contains permitted thickeners, flavour enhancer.
• Allergen Advice: for allergens including soybean, see ingredients in bold.
• May be present in traces of shrimp, anchovy.
metaData.Key Information: Best meal alternative with authentic Korean taste.
